problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Atomic. Atomic layer deposition of conformal coating directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
